steps.title: Make the circle standard
steps.content:
Divide the equation by $2$ so the squared terms have coefficient $1$.
$$
x^2+y^2+\frac{t}{2}x+\frac{t}{2}y-35=0
$$

steps.title: Complete both squares
steps.content:
Half of $\frac{t}{2}$ is $\frac{t}{4}$, so each completed square adds $\frac{t^2}{16}$.
$$
(x+\frac{t}{4})^2+(y+\frac{t}{4})^2=35+2(\frac{t^2}{16})
$$
$$
(x+\frac{t}{4})^2+(y+\frac{t}{4})^2=35+\frac{t^2}{8}
$$

steps.title: Match the radius
steps.content: The radius is $\sqrt{43}$, so the radius squared is $43$. $$ 35+\frac{t^2}{8}=43 $$ $$ \frac{t^2}{8}=8 $$ $$ t^2=64 $$ Since $t$ is positive, use the positive value. The answer is 8.
